style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow-drifting mist particles that leave faint afterimages in the air, shadows elongating unnaturally around its body as if bending space itself; cold blue-white ghostly luminescence pulses through its translucent form, casting distorted reflections in nearby puddles that ripple like broken glass; Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
